hooks.prompt: Block any command that contains 'rm -rf /', 'rm -rf ~', 'rm -rf .', 'git push --force', 'git push -f', 'sudo rm', or 'DROP TABLE'. Also block reading from ~/.ssh/, ~/.aws/, ~/.gnupg/, or any .env file. Return {"ok": false, "reason": "Blocked: destructive or sensitive operation"} if matched, otherwise {"ok": true}.
